name: Patient 9
history: Long-standing friendship with Jersey who has multiple surgeries. Patient has provided support during medical procedures. Ongoing conflict with roommate.
intermediate_belief: I have to be there for everyone else, even at my own expense.
intermediate_belief_depression: My needs always come last because I'm the caretaker.
coping_strategies: Caregiving for others, neglecting own needs, managing multiple responsibilities.
situation: Thinking about Jersey's recovery while managing other personal responsibilities.
auto_thought: I should be doing more for Jersey, but I'm overwhelmed with my own problems.
behavior: Worry about friend's recovery while handling roommate conflicts.
